# Code of Conduct

## Our Standard

Be respectful. Provide constructive feedback. Welcome newcomers.

## Scope

This applies to all project spaces: issues, PRs, discussions, and commits.

## Enforcement

Unacceptable behavior can be reported to the maintainer via [GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/gfreschi/claude-code-statusline/security/advisories). Reports will be reviewed and acted on promptly.

## Attribution

Adapted from the [Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/).
